untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by volatility percentile (quintile Q1 vs Q5) across a universe. The allowed indicators include hvol_20 (historical volatility) but do NOT include cross-sectional percentile ranking or quintile bucketing functionality. To properly implement this signal, the backtest engine must support: (1) volatility_percentile or volatility_rank indicators, or (2) a quintile bucketing function that ranks all stocks in universe and assigns Q1-Q5 buckets. The entry/exit conditions as written are logically circular without the ranking mechanism.
translation_notes: This is a cross-sectional, rank-based volatility strategy that cannot be expressed using only point-in-time indicators. hvol_20 measures individual stock volatility but cannot encode 'lowest quintile' vs 'highest quintile' without a ranking/bucketing layer. Recommend adding volatility_percentile or volatility_quintile indicators to the allowed list, or implementing a custom ranking function in the backtest engine.
